bead.title: docs: update task-execution cleanup contract for descendant reaping
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The task-execution docs still describe cleanup as file/liveness cleanup only. They do not mention stale attempt-descendant process groups, dry-run/apply process reporting, or the startup pre-claim cleanup pass, so the documented contract would lag the implementation after the process-cleanup work lands.

ROOT CAUSE
`docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md:833-884` and `:1241-1249` describe DDx-owned cleanup scope, visibility, and resource preflight, but they do not mention descendant process-group reaping or the operator-visible process findings that the new cleanup path will report.
`docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-025-task-execution-lifecycle.md:234-357` describes the cleanup manager and its conservative deletion rules, but it likewise lacks the new process-census/reaper contract and the startup pre-claim process pass.

PROPOSED FIX
- Update FEAT-010's cleanup section so it explicitly mentions stale attempt-descendant process-group reaping, dry-run/apply reporting, and the startup pre-claim pass.
- Update SD-025's cleanup-manager section so it names the process ownership/liveness evidence used to decide staleness and the operator-visible process findings emitted by cleanup.
- Keep the rest of the task-execution vocabulary and lifecycle layering unchanged.

NON-SCOPE
- No code changes, no tests, and no tracker mutations beyond this split.
- No new feature scope outside task-execution cleanup.
- No changes to unrelated specs or docs.
bead.acceptance:
1. FEAT-010's cleanup section (`docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-010-task-execution.md:833-884` and `:1241-1249`) explicitly mentions stale attempt-descendant process-group reaping, dry-run/apply reporting, and the startup pre-claim cleanup pass.
2. SD-025's cleanup-manager section (`docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-025-task-execution-lifecycle.md:234-357`) explicitly mentions the process ownership/liveness evidence used for staleness decisions and the operator-visible process findings emitted by cleanup.
3. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
